title: Skint Dragon (Heart of Universe)
description: This mod adds Skint Dragon from "Heart of Universe" (MrLololowka) to your minecraft!
body:
This mod adds the legendary dragon from the "Heart of Universe" letsplay, created by blogger MrLololowka, to your Minecraft. Now you can spawn this powerful and majestic creature with a unique appearance.

**THIS MOD IN BETA TESTING.**

Mod Features & Their Impact on Gameplay:


```
1. Dragon — Not the boss:
1.1. What it is: A dragon is not a boss. You need to spawn it, and just fly it or walk on the ground.
1.2. Impact on Experience: The dragon can take you anywhere.

2. Epic Flight & Mobility:
2.1. What it is: This is the mod's core feature. You can saddle up and take to the skies! The flight mechanics are smooth and intuitive, this unlocking a brand-new way to explore the world.
2.2. Impact on Experience: You gain unparalleled mobility. Say goodbye to long, tedious land journeys. Now you can quickly traverse vast distances, admire your builds from a bird's-eye view, and easily reach the most remote biomes. This changes how you interact with your entire world.

3. Unique Model & Animations:
3.1. What it is: The dragon features a highly detailed 3D model and fluid animations, including wing flaps, head turns, and landing sequences.
3.2. Impact on Experience: The feeling of flight is incredibly realistic and cinematic. You aren't just hovering in the air — you are commanding a living, breathing creature, which greatly enhances immersion and the sense of wonder.

4. Combat Assistance (work-in-progress):
4.1. What it is: Your tamed dragon isn't just a taxi. It can attack your enemies with powerful magic or other abilities, whether you are in the saddle or fighting on the ground beside it.
4.2. Impact on Experience: You become a formidable force on both land and air. Travel becomes safer, and battles with other bosses (like the Wither) become easier with aerial support, adding a new strategic layer to combat.

5. Customization & Care (work-in-progress)
5.1. What it is: The ability to name your dragon, potentially change its gear (saddles, armor).
5.2. Impact on Experience: This deepens the bond between you and your pet. The dragon feels like a permanent and valuable part of your adventure, not just a temporary tool.

```

Find bug or have any suggestions? Tell us in our [discord](https://discord.gg/YghsVKktcH)
